Digital transformation · AI · Full-stack

Ararso Alisho

Senior Software & AI Engineer · Co-Founder

Co-founder and hands-on builder across the full stack—AI, prompt engineering, GenAI, machine learning, and data analysis—shipping secure, scalable products from idea to production.

Get in touch View projects Download resume

About

Innovative and results-driven Senior Software & AI Developer with 4+ years of extensive experience in developing and leading digital transformation projects for government, private organizations, and educational platforms.

Lead Developer and Manager at Damina Tech PLC, where I spearheaded large-scale digital initiatives, including municipal digitalization, e-learning platforms serving 6,000+ students, and AI-powered public service solutions.

Proficient in Python, Django, React, Node.js, Next.js, TypeScript, prompt engineering, GenAI and AI/ML technologies, with a proven track record of delivering scalable, secure, and high-performance systems. Contributed to OpenAI’s ChatGPT as a Python Developer, AI Trainer, and Evaluator, improving model response accuracy by up to 70%.

Skilled in project management, cross-functional team leadership, and stakeholder engagement, with a strong focus on leveraging technology to increase operational efficiency, automate workflows, and enhance user experience.

Lead Developer AI Product Delivery Full-Stack Engineering Data Analytics Digital Transformation Leadership & Mentorship

Experience

Damina Tech PLC

Lead Developer, Co-Founder & Manager

Digital transformation for government, enterprise, and education—Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

  • Delivered 10+ production systems for public and private sector clients (e.g. Chiro City, Dire Dawa City Sport Commission, Oromia Majlis).
  • Improved public service delivery efficiency by an estimated 60–70% through automation and digital workflows; cut manual paperwork by 70%+.
  • Owned the full lifecycle: design → deployment → maintenance with emphasis on scalability, security, and reliability.
  • Led cross-functional teams and delivery practices that increased project velocity by roughly 40%.
  • Built enterprise tools and e-learning used by thousands; trained and mentored 600+ learners, many moving into tech careers.
  • Integrated Power BI and custom reporting into 10+ platforms so leadership gets real-time insight—supporting faster decisions and stronger project tracking.
November 2024 – Present | Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

DowellUx Living Lab

Backend Developer

Social media automation platform · Remote (India)

  • Led backend work for a multi-user automation product; optimized REST APIs in Python for 55%+ performance gains.
  • Raised reliability and cut defects ~60% via structured testing, clean architecture, and secure auth/data handling.
  • Automated CI/CD, reducing deployment time by ~70% and improving release quality.
  • Partnered with product and frontend to ship features faster (~25% efficiency gain); tuned queries and refactored core logic to cut latency under higher concurrency.
April 2024 – January 2025 | Remote

Ethiopian Artificial Intelligence Institute

Full-Stack & AI Developer

Enterprise systems and AI for public-sector efficiency · Addis Ababa

  • Shipped 5+ enterprise systems (reporting, planning, user management) with Django, React, and REST APIs.
  • Delivered an AI-powered Smart Police System that improved response and analysis efficiency by 60%+.
  • Designed and optimized APIs for ~40% better performance; testing and engineering discipline reduced errors ~70%.
  • Collaborated across disciplines to ship secure, scalable solutions aligned with institutional goals.
September 2023 – December 2024 | Addis Ababa, Ethiopia

OpenAI

Python Developer & AI Trainer (LLMs / ChatGPT)

Model quality, evaluation, and training infrastructure · Remote

  • Contributed to ChatGPT and related LLMs as a developer, trainer, and evaluator.
  • Improved model response accuracy by up to 70% through feedback loops, data work, and rigorous evaluation.
  • Built and optimized Python data pipelines for training and evaluation workflows.
  • Applied prompt engineering and annotation to strengthen reasoning, reliability, and user experience.
December 2022 – June 2024 | Remote

Upwork

Freelance Python Developer

Global clients · Remote

  • Delivered Django applications, scraping tools, automation bots, and data analysis pipelines for international clients.
  • Owned requirements through delivery—cleaning, extracting, and analyzing data to produce actionable insight.
  • Consistently met deadlines with strong client satisfaction across automation and web projects.
August 2021 – December 2022 | Remote

Tarkanfi General Corporation

Full-Stack Developer

Hybrid · Harar, Ethiopia

  • Led full-stack delivery of a promotional site and commodity exchange platform, driving ~80% lift in online engagement.
  • Improved operational efficiency ~60% by digitizing commodity tracking and management for 1,400+ farmers.
  • Shipped secure, scalable systems with real-time inventory and transaction visibility.
February 2022 – November 2022 | Harar, Ethiopia

Oromia Broadcasting Network (OBN)

Software Development Intern

Broadcasting & internal systems · Adama, Ethiopia

  • Built an E-Student Management System that improved administrative efficiency ~40% for a high school program.
  • Supported media content workflows and distribution across channels.
May 2021 – September 2021 | Adama, Ethiopia

Projects

Flagship platforms shipped at Damina Tech, plus selected open-source samples. Numbers reflect outcomes described on my resume; I’m happy to walk through architecture, security, and metrics in interviews.

Chiro City Digitalization

Full-stack municipal platform automating citizen services, workflows, and dashboards—online access at scale.

Impact & stack
  • ~60% improvement in request processing and admin workflows (resume).
  • Online services for 100,000+ citizens with real-time dashboards.
  • End-to-end ownership: APIs, web app, deployment, and maintenance.
Oromia Majlis Digitalization

Secure legislative platform for services, documents, and member communications—full digital tracking of activities.

Outcomes
  • ~70% reduction in manual workflows (resume).
  • 100% digital traceability for legislative activities.
  • Enterprise-grade security and scalability for sensitive data.
TiruShop E-Commerce

Scalable commerce: catalog, inventory, payments, and fulfillment—optimized UX across web and mobile.

Outcomes
  • ~60% lift in online sales; ~80% better order fulfillment efficiency (resume).
  • Integrated payments and inventory workflows.
  • Performance- and conversion-minded front end.
Damina E-Learning

Digital skills platform with interactive courses, assessments, and student dashboards—built for serious scale.

Scale & engagement
  • 6,000+ students; ~80% engagement lift (resume).
  • Real-time assessments and progress tracking.
  • Remote-friendly learning at national scale.
Web Scraping & Data Pipelines

Python tooling for extraction, cleaning, and analysis—government trade data, market feeds, and automation-friendly outputs.

Technical
  • Python, Requests, Selenium, Beautiful Soup
  • CSV / analytical workflows for downstream use
  • Representative of freelance and product data work
Commodity Exchange (Django)

Production-style trading workflows with role-based access—aligns with full-stack commodity work at Tarkanfi.

Technical
  • Django APIs and domain modeling
  • Bulma UI, secure multi-user flows
  • Open source reference implementation
